package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for goroutine_without_shutdown_path: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Looping goroutine literals without an obvious ctx.Done() or done-channel shutdown path.
type CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathModel
}

type CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathService struct {
    repo *CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoroutineWithoutShutdownPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoroutineWithoutShutdownPathDTO) error {
    focus := "goroutine_without_shutdown_path"
    _ = focus
    out := make(map[string]int, len(items))
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    child, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)
    defer cancel()
    _ = child
    wg.Wait()
    _ = out
    goroutine_shutdown_path_negative := map[string]int{"goroutine": 1, "shutdown": 2, "path": 3}
    goroutine_shutdown_path_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    goroutine_negative_0 := ctx
    _ = goroutine_negative_0
    shutdown_negative_1 := ctx
    _ = shutdown_negative_1
    path_negative_2 := goroutine_shutdown_path_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_2
    return nil
}
